RULING: COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/VC) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR 8620

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISSION, MICHAEL PEEVEY, FRED HARRIS, NANCY RODRIGUEZ AND BECKY REYES' DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCES: DAVID A. CARRILLO, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL (OFFICE OF THE ATTORNEY GENERAL, 510.622.2215) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARANCES.
RULING: COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION ONE THROUGH FOUR WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE CALIFORNIA PUBLIC RECORDS ACT IS THE EXCLUSIVE REMEDY FOR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM: FILARSKY V SUPERIOR COURT (2002) 28 CAL. 4TH 419, 433. PLAINTIFF ALSO HAS FAILED TO FILE A TORT CLAIM. OVERRULED AS TO THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION. THE PUBLIC RECORDS ACT AUTHORNIZES INJUNCTIVE RELIEF AGAINST GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES FOR VIOLATIONS OF THE ACT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
